none.justification: Matches the GT: header is include/linux/skbuff.h:842, exact count is 21, and the listed net/core direct includers match with no extras or omissions. It also gives a second count method and notes only canonical <linux/skbuff.h> spelling was found.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT on the defining header and line, exact count 21, and the complete includer list. The cross-check claims graph edges plus grep agree, and there are no missing or extra files relative to the GT.

codegraph.justification: Matches the GT: include/linux/skbuff.h:842, exact count 21, and the includer list is complete and limited to direct net/core .c files. The two grep/find checks agree at 21; the extra end-line detail is not harmful.
